title: Novel combinatory method for surface and crystallinity analysis of crystalline materials
author: Matkivskyi, Røyset, et al.

steps.title: Method validation
steps.instruction: The two tools described above were combined to determine the etching response of individual crystals in multi-crystalline Si wafers to different etching solutions. The method consisted of the main experimental steps: wafer polishing, Laue tool scanning, WLI scanning, wet chemical etching, second round WLI scanning as illustrated in Fig. 3.

steps.title: Sample preparation (polishing of the Si surface)
steps.instruction: To prepare the as-cut mc-Si wafer samples, chemical cleaning and subsequent polishing are required. The multi-crystalline Si wafers were laser cut into 4 × 4 cm2 pieces and cleaned in the RCA1 solution at 65-70°C and dried.
